TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Anthony Bonner sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 6, Anthony Bonner, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Anthony Bonner sraral maki Saint Louis University mzyu mari. 2002 kawas,tzyun payat kawas nya qnyat balay mzyu mari nha Utah Jazz. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: antД§onj ОІonner s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, wal malaxmis~Й•uq qanij la. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj * nqu taj *, antД§onj ОІonner, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. qjanux na Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru antД§onj ОІonner s~Й•raral maki s~Й•aint louis~Й• uni*ers~Й•itj mzju mari. **** kawas~Й•,tzjun pajat kawas~Й• nja qnjat ОІalaj mzju mari nД§a utaД§ *azz. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
